description: Serpstat is an SEO and search intelligence platform for keyword research, competitor analysis, backlinks, audits, rank tracking, and related reporting. It also provides AI-oriented access to its data through an MCP server for clients like Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini.
summary: Serpstat exposes a public SEO data API over HTTP/JSON-RPC, a remote OAuth-protected MCP server at https://mcp.serpstat.com/mcp, and a local Node.js MCP CLI package for STDIO use.
